content:
▎跨过「极夜与破晓」，历经「重生于湮土」，这是献给你的小小礼物。

✦ 兑换码：致拯救忘却前夜的你
✦ 礼包内容：无垢之芯×100
✦ 有效期至2026年3月9日
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——
▎Having crossed the "Dusk and Dawn" and endured an "Annihilated Rebirth," this is our small gift to you.

✦ Redemption Code: YouSavedMorimens
✦ Content: Pure Core×100
✦ Valid until March 9, 2026

勒姆瓦希的黄沙，利莫里亚的潮涌，伊萨拉乌的黑岩。
背叛的刀刃，究竟由何种铸成？
「少数人可以根据结果推论出一系列证据，这就是逆向推理。」
「排除其他一切可能，最后剩下的就算再不可思议，也必定是真相。」
「真正的凶手，就是你！」

请守密人在评论区指认出自己认为的凶手，并分享推理过程吧！
正确答案揭晓后，评论区将分享「银芯×200」的兑换码。
推理收获最高点赞、互动的三位守密人，将额外获得「流明之芯×5」哦！

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Reverse Inference

The sands of Remouahe, the surging tides of Lemuria, and the obsidian of Isarawu.
From which of these was the traitor's blade forged?
"The clever few work backwards from the outcome to uncover a whole chain of evidence. That's reverse inference."
"After eliminating the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth."
"The real murderer... is YOU!"

Keepers, name your suspect in the comments and share your reasoning!
After the correct answer is revealed, we'll share a "Silver×200" redemption code in the comments.
The three Keepers with the sharpest wits (most likes/interactions) will each receive "Luminous Core×5"!
